command: Write-Host '=== ARABIC FONTS IN MY-RESTAURANT-APP ===' ; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\projects\my-restaurant-app" -Recurse -Include *.ttf,*.otf -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, FullName, Length | Format-List ; Write-Host '=== FONTS FOLDER STRUCTURE ===' ; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\projects" -Recurse -Directory -Filter '*font*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName | Format-List ; Write-Host '=== LOCAL REPO PATH ===' ; Get-ChildItem -Path C:\ -Directory -Filter 'Cloud-Controlled-Agent' -Recurse -Depth 4 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName | Format-List
description: البحث عن مسار الخطوط العربية ومسار المستودع المحلي
